title: gentiana algida var. parviflora
intro: Gentiana algida var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered glacier gentian, is a rare, alpine plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gentiana algida var. parviflora are primarily attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Gentiana algida var. parviflora is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
